headline: Built for Ashby
subheadline: AI-driven tools to optimize recruitment processes and enhance community engagement for high-value companies.

challenges.title: Scalable Hiring
challenges.desc: Ashby serves high-value companies that need efficient recruitment tools. Managing growth from 1,300 to 2,700 customers strains existing processes. This leads to productivity gaps in achieving targets.

challenges.title: AI Integration
challenges.desc: With recent funding for AI-native infrastructure, Ashby must incorporate these tools smoothly. Balancing AI adoption with user needs can create inefficiencies. Poor integration risks diminishing ROI on hiring efforts.

challenges.title: Feedback Management
challenges.desc: Ashby's platform requires precise feedback visibility settings for admins and users. Handling access in a collaborative environment is complex. Missteps can result in privacy issues or lost insights for community engagement.

challenges.title: Community Engagement
challenges.desc: As a TA expert, Kayla focuses on fostering interactions for productivity. Scaling these efforts with increasing customers is challenging. Ineffective tools can hinder teams from meeting their goals.

deliverables.title: AI Recruitment System
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI tool to automate candidate screening and integrate with Ashby's ATS for seamless data flow. This addresses scaling hiring processes by enhancing efficiency in talent acquisition.

deliverables.title: Community Tools Platform
deliverables.desc: Develops features for managing newsletters and tracking engagement ROI, integrating with Ashby's marketing systems. This boosts community interactions and supports productivity goals for high-value companies.

deliverables.title: Analytics Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Creates a dashboard to monitor hiring metrics and revenue growth, pulling data from Ashby's tools. This helps in making data-driven decisions for enterprise-grade recruitment processes.

deliverables.title: Feedback Integration System
deliverables.desc: Implements role-based feedback mechanisms that connect with Ashby's user management. This ensures secure and efficient handling of insights, improving collaboration in recruitment efforts.

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Ashby's current sales infrastructure and identify specific recruitment pain points.

engagementSteps.title: Design Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Prototype AI solutions tailored to Ashby's needs for hiring and community engagement.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate and launch the new systems with initial testing for Ashby's operations.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It optimizes sales processes using AI for B2B SaaS companies.

faqItems.question: How does it help Ashby?
faqItems.answer: It streamlines recruitment and community engagement specific to Ashby's tools.

faqItems.question: What are the integration options?
faqItems.answer: It connects with Ashby's ATS and analytics for seamless operations.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: It spans three months as per the outlined steps.

faqItems.question: Is customization available?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's tailored to Ashby's business context.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Expect improved efficiency in hiring and better productivity outcomes.

stackItems.name: AWS
stackItems.role: Provides cloud hosting for scalable recruitment software

stackItems.name: AI Frameworks
stackItems.role: Enables AI-native features for hiring infrastructure

stackItems.name: Analytics Tools
stackItems.role: Tracks metrics and supports data-driven decisions

stackItems.name: Newsletter Platforms
stackItems.role: Facilitates community engagement and marketing efforts
